final:
module SR_latch (
    input wire SR_S,
    input wire R,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    always @ (SR_S or R) begin
        if (SR_S && R) begin
            Q <= 1'bx; // Invalid state
            Qn <= 1'bx; // Invalid state
        end
        else if (SR_S) begin
            Q <= 1'b1;  // Set
            Qn <= 1'b0; // Not Q
        end
        else if (R) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;  // Reset
            Qn <= 1'b1; // Not Q
        end
    end
endmodule
